mappings.reason: Disabling unnecessary services on enterprise assets directly satisfies MDM-03's requirement to disable unnecessary hardware capabilities and functionalities on mobile devices.
Separating enterprise workspaces on mobile end-user devices is a specific security feature configuration required by MDM-03 for mobile devices.
Enforcing automatic device lockout on portable end-user devices enables a management-defined security feature required by MDM-03.
Enforcing remote wipe capability on portable end-user devices enables a management-defined security feature required by MDM-03.
Configuring automatic session locking on mobile end-user devices enables a management-defined security feature required by MDM-03.
Implementing a host-based firewall on end-user devices enables a management-defined security feature required by MDM-03.
Managing and disabling default accounts on enterprise assets disables unnecessary functionalities required by MDM-03.
Encrypting data on end-user devices enables a management-defined security feature required by MDM-03.
Deploying anti-malware software on enterprise assets enables a management-defined security feature required by MDM-03.
Enabling anti-exploitation features on enterprise assets enables a management-defined security feature required by MDM-03.
Disabling autorun and autoplay for removable media disables unnecessary functionalities required by MDM-03.
